description: Vertical designed 'Labor News' card over a dark photograph of a welder at work. The upper image shows a person in a green long-sleeve shirt and a dark welding helmet (marked 'Lincoln Electric') bent over a metal workpiece, with a bright bluish-white welding arc at center and sparks lighting a shadowy industrial interior. A faint U.S. Department of Labor seal watermark is in the lower right. Overlaid on a blue rectangular tab is the italic white label 'Labor News' beside four small vertical bars, and below in bold white serif is the headline 'U.S. Department of Labor Awards $86 Million to 14 states for investment in skills training for critical in-demand, emerging industries.' Small white text 'DOL.GOV' is at the bottom right.
notable_text: Labor News; U.S. Department of Labor Awards $86 Million to 14 states for investment in skills training for critical in-demand, emerging industries; DOL.GOV
